assertionResults.title: registerCanvasApi pushes initial draw settings into the api and clears context menu on null

assertionResults.fullName: FloorplanContext performOperation dispatches each operation to the api
assertionResults.title: performOperation dispatches each operation to the api

assertionResults.title: performOperation is a no-op when no api is registered

assertionResults.title: undo guards prevent calling api when only a single state remains

assertionResults.title: redo guards prevent calling api when there are no redo states

assertionResults.title: undo/redo call through to the api once multiple states exist

assertionResults.title: pushState writes to room-edit stacks while in room edit mode

assertionResults.title: pushState writes to the normal stacks when not in room edit
